phases.name: Write PromptConfig and PromptMode tests
phases.reasoning: Write test_prompt_config_has_required_fields and test_prompt_config_serialization_roundtrip. These define the PromptConfig struct shape (specialist_name, mode, focus_areas, body), PromptMode enum (Gating, Advisory), and serde requirements. Tests will fail because the types don't exist yet.

phases.name: Implement PromptConfig and PromptMode types
phases.reasoning: Create src/review/prompt_loader.rs with PromptConfig struct (specialist_name: String, mode: PromptMode, focus_areas: Vec<String>, body: String) deriving Debug, Clone, Serialize, Deserialize. Create PromptMode enum (Gating, Advisory) with serde rename_all lowercase, deriving Debug, Clone, PartialEq, Eq, Serialize, Deserialize. Create PromptFrontmatter internal struct. Add pub mod prompt_loader to mod.rs and re-export types. Phase 01 tests must pass.

phases.name: Write PromptLoader tests
phases.reasoning: Write the remaining 8 tests: test_load_prompt_returns_hardcoded_default_when_no_file, test_load_prompt_returns_defaults_for_all_builtin_specialists, test_load_prompt_from_file_overrides_default, test_load_prompt_parses_yaml_frontmatter_and_body, test_load_prompt_handles_malformed_yaml_gracefully, test_load_prompt_handles_empty_file_gracefully, test_load_prompt_file_without_focus_areas_section, test_prompt_loader_resolves_correct_file_path. These define PromptLoader::new(), load_specialist_prompt(), prompt_file_path(), frontmatter parsing, focus area extraction, and all fallback behaviors. Tests will fail because PromptLoader doesn't exist yet.

phases.name: Implement PromptLoader
phases.reasoning: Implement PromptLoader struct with forge_dir: PathBuf. Methods: new(forge_dir) stores path; prompt_file_path(specialist) returns {forge_dir}/autoresearch/prompts/{agent_name}.md; load_specialist_prompt(specialist) tries load_from_file then falls back to build_default_config; load_from_file parses YAML frontmatter (split on --- delimiters, deserialize PromptFrontmatter), extracts body, parses ## Focus Areas bullet points, returns None on any error with tracing::warn; build_default_config constructs from SpecialistType data with body template matching dispatcher.rs format (Role, Focus Areas, Instructions, Output Format sections without phase/context/files sections). All 10 tests must pass, cargo check must succeed, existing review tests must not regress.
